output_padding, int64_t groups) {\\n1188:   TORCH_CHECK_NOT_IMPLEMENTED(false, \\\"convolution_overrideable not implemented. You are likely triggering this with tensor backend other than CPU/CUDA/MKLDNN, if this is intended, please use TORCH_LIBRARY_IMPL to override this function \\\");\\n1189: }\\n1190: \\n1191: // Function to select the convolution backend based on the inputs and params.\\n1192: // This overload is used within the convolution internals but not exposed to python.\\n1193: // NB: The forward pass provides a bias tensor while the backward pass provides\\n1194: // a bool indicating whether the bias is defined. This is done to save memory by\\n1195: // avoiding saving the full bias tensor for backward.\\n1196: template <typename T>\\n1197: static ConvBackend _select_conv_backend(\\n1198:     const Tensor& input,\\n1199:     const Tensor& weight,\\n1200:     const std::optional<Tensor>& bias,\\n1201:     const at::OptionalArrayRef<T> bias_sizes_opt,\\n1202:     const bool need_backward,\\n1203:     const ConvParams<T>& params) {\\n1204: \\n1205:   // don't send empty inputs through backends\\n1206:   if (at::symint::size<T>(input, 0) == 0 || at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == 0) {\\n1207:     return input.is_mkldnn() ? ConvBackend::MkldnnEmpty : ConvBackend::Empty;\\n1208:   } else if (at::symint::numel<T>(input) == 0) {\\n1209:     TORCH_CHECK(false, \\\"Only zero batch or zero channel inputs are supported, but got input shape: \\\", at::symint::sizes<T>(input));\\n1210:   }\\n1211: \\n1212:   if (params.is_depthwise(input, weight)) {\\n1213:     if (params.use_cudnn_depthwise(input, weight)) {\\n1214:       return ConvBackend::Cudnn;\\n1215:     } else if (params.use_miopen(input, weight, bias_sizes_opt.has_value())) {\\n1216:       return ConvBackend::MiopenDepthwise;\\n1217:     } else {\\n1218:       if (input.ndimension() == 4) {\\n1219:         return ConvBackend::CudaDepthwise2d;\\n1220:       } else if (input.ndimension() == 5) {\\n1221:         return ConvBackend::CudaDepthwise3d;\\n1222:       } else {\\n1223:         // unsupported\\n1224:       }\\n1225:     }\\n1226:   } else if (params.use_cudnn(input, weight)) {\\n1227:     if (params.transposed) {\\n1228:       return ConvBackend::CudnnTranspose;\\n1229:     } else {\\n1230:       return ConvBackend::Cudnn;\\n1231:     }\\n1232:   } else if (params.use_miopen(input, weight, bias_sizes_opt.has_value())) {\\n1233:     if (params.transposed) {\\n1234:       return ConvBackend::MiopenTranspose;\\n1235:     } else {\\n1236:       return ConvBackend::Miopen;\\n1237:     }\\n1238:   } else if (params.use_mkldnn(input, weight)) {\\n1239:     if (params.transposed) {\\n1240:       return ConvBackend::MkldnnTranspose;\\n1241:     } else {\\n1242:       return ConvBackend::Mkldnn;\\n1243:     }\\n1244:   } else if (!need_backward && params.use_xnnpack(input, weight, bias_sizes_opt)) {\\n1245:     // Using prepacked conv is preferred, but XNNPACK is still the fastest\\n1246:     // option for NHWC.\\n1247:     return ConvBackend::Xnnpack2d;\\n1248:   // 3x3 depthwith convolutions implementation is inference only\\n1249:   } else if (!need_backward && params.use_cpu_depthwise3x3_winograd(input, weight, bias)) {\\n1250:     return ConvBackend::Winograd3x3Depthwise;\\n1251:   } else if (\\n1252:       !params.transposed && (input.ndimension() == 5) &&\\n1253:       (input.device().is_cpu()) &&\\n1254:       !params.is_dilated()) {\\n1255:     // fast path for grouped conv3d\\n1256:     return ConvBackend::Slow3d;\\n1257:   } else if (input.device().is_cpu() || input.is_cuda()) {\\n1258:     // backends without support for groups\\n1259:     if (params.transposed) {\\n1260:       if (input.ndimension() == 4) {\\n1261:         return ConvBackend::SlowTranspose2d;\\n1262:       } else if (input.ndimension() == 5) {\\n1263:         return ConvBackend::SlowTranspose3d;\\n1264:       } else {\\n1265:         // unsupported\\n1266:       }\\n1267:     } else {  /* Not transposed */\\n1268:       if (input.ndimension() == 4) {\\n1269:         if (params.is_dilated()) {\\n1270:           return ConvBackend::SlowDilated2d;\\n1271:         } else {  /* dim == 4, non-dilated */\\n1272:           if (params.use_nnpack(input, weight)) {\\n1273:             return ConvBackend::NnpackSpatial;\\n1274:           } else {\\n1275:             /* CPU implementation has specialized MM kernels\\n1276:                for non-dilated case here */\\n1277:             return ConvBackend::Slow2d;\\n1278:           }\\n1279:         }\\n1280:       } else if (input.ndimension() == 5 && (input.is_cuda() || params.is_dilated())) {\\n1281:         return ConvBackend::SlowDilated3d;\\n1282:       } else if (input.ndimension() == 5) { /* dim == 5, CPU, non-dilated */\\n1283:         /* CPU implementation has specialized MM kernels\\n1284:            for non-dilated case here */\\n1285:         return ConvBackend::Slow3d;\\n1286:       } else {\\n1287:         // unsupported\\n1288:       }\\n1289:     }\\n1290:   } else if (params.use_mps(input, weight)) {\\n1291:     if (params.transposed) {\\n1292:       return ConvBackend::MpsTranspose;\\n1293:     } else {\\n1294:       return ConvBackend::Mps;\\n1295:     }\\n1296:   } else {\\n1297:     // Only reach here when input is backend with out-of-source implementation.\\n1298:     return ConvBackend::Overrideable;\\n1299:   }\\n1300: \\n1301:   // Error out if no suitable backend was found.\\n1302:   TORCH_CHECK(false, \\\"unsupported ConvNd parameters\\\");\\n1303: }\\n1304: \\n1305: // Selects a backend for convolution based on the inputs and params.\\n1306: ConvBackend select_conv_backend(\\n1307:     const Tensor& input_r, const Tensor& weight_r, const std::optional<Tensor>& bias_opt,\\n1308:     SymIntArrayRef stride_, SymIntArrayRef padding_, SymIntArrayRef dilation_,\\n1309:     bool transposed_, SymIntArrayRef output_padding_, c10::SymInt groups_, const at::OptionalSymIntArrayRef bias_sizes_opt) {\\n1310:   c10::MaybeOwned<Tensor> bias_maybe_owned = at::borrow_from_optional_tensor(bias_opt);\\n1311:   const Tensor& bias = *bias_maybe_owned;\\n1312: \\n1313:   auto& ctx = at::globalContext();\\n1314:   auto k = weight_r.ndimension();\\n1315:   int64_t dim = k - 2;\\n1316:   ConvParams<c10::SymInt> params;\\n1317:   params.stride = expand_param_if_needed(stride_, \\\"stride\\\", dim);\\n1318:   params.padding = expand_param_if_needed(padding_, \\\"padding\\\", dim);\\n1319:   params.dilation = expand_param_if_needed(dilation_, \\\"dilation\\\", dim);\\n1320:   params.transposed = transposed_;\\n1321:   params.output_padding = expand_param_if_needed(output_padding_, \\\"output_padding\\\", dim);\\n1322:   params.groups = std::move(groups_);\\n1323:   params.benchmark = ctx.benchmarkCuDNN();\\n1324:   params.deterministic = ctx.deterministicCuDNN() || ctx.deterministicAlgorithms();\\n1325:   params.cudnn_enabled = ctx.userEnabledCuDNN();\\n1326:   params.allow_tf32 = ctx.allowTF32CuDNN(\\\"conv\\\");\\n1327: \\n1328:   auto input = input_r;\\n1329:   auto weight = weight_r;\\n1330:   check_shape_forward(input, weight.sym_sizes(), bias, params);\\n1331: \\n1332:   // Expand 1d -> 2d.\\n1333:   // This is only done for backends that don't natively support 1d spatial input.\\n1334:   if (k == 3 && !input.is_mkldnn() && !input.is_xpu()) {\\n1335:     // avoid accidentally going through NHWC for permuted 3d input.\\n1336:     input = input.contiguous();\\n1337:     params.view1d_as_2d();\\n1338:     input = view4d(input);\\n1339:     weight = view4d(weight);\\n1340:   }\\n1341: \\n1342:   auto bias_sizes = bias.defined() ? std::optional<SymIntArrayRef>(bias.sym_sizes()) : bias_sizes_opt;\\n1343:   bool need_backward = GradMode::is_enabled() &&\\n1344:       (input.requires_grad() || weight.requires_grad() || (bias.defined() && bias.requires_grad()));\\n1345:   return _select_conv_backend(input, weight, bias, bias_sizes, need_backward, params);\\n1346: }\\n1347: \\n1348: // For BC reasons, have a copy that does not require bias_opt\\n1349: static ConvBackend select_conv_backend(\\n1350:     const Tensor& input,\\n1351:     const Tensor& weight,\\n1352:     const at::OptionalIntArrayRef bias_sizes_opt,\\n1353:     const bool need_backward,\\n1354:     const ConvParams<int64_t>& params) {\\n1355:   return _select_conv_backend(input, weight, {}, bias_sizes_opt, need_backward, params);\\n1356: }\\n1357: \\n1358: static at::Tensor _convolution_nogroup_backend(\\n1359:     const Tensor& input,\\n1360:     const Tensor& weight,\\n1361:     const Tensor& bias,\\n1362:     const ConvBackend backend,\\n1363:     const ConvParams<int64_t>& params) {\\n1364:   auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\n1365:   switch(backend) {\\n1366:     case ConvBackend::NnpackSpatial:\\n1367: #if AT_NNPACK_ENABLED()\\n1368:       return at::_nnpack_spatial_convolution(input, weight, bias, params.padding, params.stride);\\n1369: #else\\n1370:       TORCH_INTERNAL_ASSERT(false, \\\"NnpackSpatial backend was selected in PyTorch compiled without nnpack support\\\");\\n1371: #endif\\n1372:     case ConvBackend::Slow2d:\\n1373:       return at::thnn_conv2d(input, weight, kernel_size, bias, params.stride, params.padding);\\n1374:     case ConvBackend::SlowDilated2d:\\n1375:       return at::slow_conv_dilated2d(\\n1376:           input, weight, kernel_size, bias, params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation);\\n1377:     case ConvBackend::SlowDilated3d:\\n1378:       return at::slow_conv_dilated3d(\\n1379:           input, weight, kernel_size, bias, params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation);\\n1380:     case ConvBackend::SlowTranspose2d:\\n1381:       return at::slow_conv_transpose2d(\\n1382:           input, weight, kernel_size, bias, params.stride, params.padding, params.output_padding, params.dilation);\\n1383:     case ConvBackend::SlowTranspose3d:\\n1384:       return at::slow_conv_transpose3d(\\n1385:           input, weight, kernel_size, bias, params.stride, params.padding, params.output_padding, params.dilation);\\n1386:     default:\\n1387:       TORCH_CHECK(false, \\\"Unsupported conv nogroup backend encountered\\\");\\n1388:   }\\n1389: }\\n1390: \\n1391: static inline std::vector<int64_t> calc_output_size(\\n1392:     const Tensor& input,\\n1393:     const Tensor& weight,\\n1394:     const ConvParams<int64_t>& params) {\\n1395:   std::vector<int64_t> output_size = params.transposed ?\\n1396:     conv_input_size(input.sizes(), weight.sizes(), params.padding, params.output_padding,\\n1397:         params.stride, params.dilation, params.groups) :\\n1398:     conv_output_size(input.sizes(), weight.sizes(), params.padding, params.stride, params.dilation);\\n1399: \\n1400:   // Handle empty # of channels.\\n1401:   if (input.size(input_channels_dim) == 0) {\\n1402:     output_size[output_channels_dim] = 0;\\n1403:   }\\n1404:   return output_size;\\n1405: }\\n1406: \\n1407: static inline at::MemoryFormat determine_backend_memory_format(\\n1408:     const Tensor& input,\\n1409:     const Tensor& weight,\\n1410:     const ConvBackend backend) {\\n1411:   auto backend_memory_format = at::MemoryFormat::Contiguous;\\n1412: #if !defined(C10_MOBILE)\\n1413:   auto k = weight.ndimension();\\n1414:   // See Note [Mobile check segfaults]\\n1415:   switch(backend) {\\n1416:     case ConvBackend::Cudnn:\\n1417:     case Tensor& input_r, const Tensor& weight_r, const std::optional<Tensor>& bias_r_opt,\\n1473:     IntArrayRef stride_, IntArrayRef padding_, IntArrayRef dilation_,\\n1474:     bool transposed_, IntArrayRef output_padding_, int64_t groups_,\\n1475:     bool benchmark, bool deterministic, bool cudnn_enabled, bool allow_tf32) {\\n1476:   // See [Note: hacky wrapper removal for optional tensor]\\n1477:   c10::MaybeOwned<Tensor> bias_r_maybe_owned = at::borrow_from_optional_tensor(bias_r_opt);\\n1478:   const Tensor& bias_r = *bias_r_maybe_owned;\\n1479: \\n1480:   auto input = input_r;\\n1481:   auto weight = weight_r;\\n1482:   auto bias = bias_r;\\n1483:   auto k = weight.ndimension();\\n1484:   c10::IntArrayRef weight_sizes = weight.sizes();\\n1485:   int64_t dim = k - 2;\\n1486: \\n1487:   TORCH_CHECK(dim > 0, \\\"weight should have at least three dimensions\\\");\\n1488:   TORCH_CHECK(groups_ > 0, \\\"non-positive groups is not supported\\\");\\n1489: \\n1490:   ConvParams<int64_t> params;\\n1491:   params.stride = expand_param_if_needed(stride_, \\\"stride\\\", dim);\\n1492:   params.padding = expand_param_if_needed(padding_, \\\"padding\\\", dim);\\n1493:   params.dilation = expand_param_if_needed(dilation_, \\\"dilation\\\", dim);\\n1494:   params.transposed = transposed_;\\n1495:   params.output_padding = expand_param_if_needed(output_padding_, \\\"output_padding\\\", dim);\\n1496:   params.groups = groups_;\\n1497:   params.benchmark = benchmark;\\n1498:   params.deterministic = deterministic;\\n1499:   params.cudnn_enabled = cudnn_enabled;\\n1500:   params.allow_tf32 = allow_tf32;\\n1501: \\n1502:   check_shape_forward(input, weight_sizes, bias, params);\\n1503: \\n1504:   // Expand 1d -> 2d.\\n1505:   // This is only done for backends that don't natively support 1d spatial input.\\n1506:   if (k == 3 && !input.is_mkldnn() && !input.is_xpu()) {\\n1507:     // avoid accidentally going through NHWC for permuted 3d input.\\n1508:     input = input.contiguous();\\n1509:     params.view1d_as_2d();\\n1510:     input = view4d(input);\\n1511:     weight = view4d(weight);\\n1512:   }\\n1513: \\n1514:   // Select appropriate backend to use.\\n1515:   auto bias_sizes_opt = bias.defined() ? std::optional<IntArrayRef>(bias.sizes()) : std::nullopt;\\n1516:   bool need_backward = GradMode::is_enabled() &&\\n1517:       (input.requires_grad() || weight.requires_grad() || (bias.defined() && bias.requires_grad()));\\n1518:   ConvBackend backend = _select_conv_backend(input, weight, bias, c10::OptionalIntArrayRef(bias_sizes_opt), need_backward, params);\\n1519:   at::MemoryFormat backend_memory_format = determine_backend_memory_format(input, weight, backend);\\n1520: \\n1521:   // Call the backend.\\n1522:   Tensor output;\\n1523:   auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\n1524:   switch (backend) {\\n1525:     case ConvBackend::CudaDepthwise2d:\\n1526:       output = at::_conv_depthwise2d(input.contiguous(), weight, kernel_size, bias,\\n1527:           params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation);\\n1528:       break;\\n1529:     case ConvBackend::CudaDepthwise3d:\\n1530:       output = at::conv_depthwise3d(input.contiguous(), weight, kernel_size, bias,\\n1531:           params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation);\\n1532: input.contiguous(backend_memory_format), weight, params.padding, params.stride,\\n1537:           params.dilation, params.groups, params.benchmark, params.deterministic, params.allow_tf32);\\n1538:       if (bias.defined()) {\\n1539:         output.add_(reshape_bias(input.dim(), bias));\\n1540:       }\\n1541:       break;\\n1542:     case ConvBackend::CudnnTranspose:\\n1543:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight, bias);\\n1544:       output = at::cudnn_convolution_transpose(\\n1545:           input.contiguous(backend_memory_format), weight, params.padding, params.output_padding,\\n1546:           params.stride, params.dilation, params.groups, params.benchmark, params.deterministic, params.allow_tf32);\\n1547:       if (bias.defined()) {\\n1548:         output.add_(reshape_bias(input.dim(), bias));\\n1549:       }\\n1550:       break;\\n1551:     case ConvBackend::Empty:\\n1552:     {\\n1553:       Tensor weight_view;\\n1554:       // Use permute and clone to avoid at::_unsafe_view(weight, -1) failure for non-contiguous cases where\\n1555:       // view size is not compatible with input tensor's size and stride.\\n1556:       if(weight.is_contiguous()) {\\n1557:         weight_view = at::_unsafe_view(weight, -1);\\n1558:       } else if (weight.is_contiguous(at::MemoryFormat::ChannelsLast)) {\\n1559:         weight_view = at::_unsafe_view(at::permute(weight, {0, 2, 3, 1}), -1);\\n1560:       } else if (weight.is_contiguous(at::MemoryFormat::ChannelsLast3d)) {\\n1561:         weight_view = at::_unsafe_view(at::permute(weight, {0, 2, 3, 4, 1}), -1);\\n1562:       } else {\\n1563:         weight_view = at::_unsafe_view(weight.clone(at::MemoryFormat::Contiguous), -1);\\n1564:       }\\n1565: \\n1566:       output = (input.size(1) == 0) ? (input.view(-1) * weight_view) : (input * weight_view[0]);\\n1567:       if (bias.defined()) {\\n1568:         output.add_(bias[0]);\\n1569:       }\\n1570:       output = output.view(calc_output_size(input, weight, params));\\n1571:       break;\\n1572:     }\\n1573:     case ConvBackend::Miopen:\\n1574:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight, bias);\\n1575:       output = at::miopen_convolution(\\n1576:           input.contiguous(backend_memory_format), weight, bias, params.padding, params.stride,\\n1577:           params.dilation, params.groups, params.benchmark, params.deterministic);\\n1578:       break;\\n1579:     case ConvBackend::MiopenDepthwise:\\n1580:       output = at::miopen_depthwise_convolution(\\n1581: params.deterministic);\\n1589:       break;\\n1590:     case ConvBackend::Mkldnn:\\n1591: #if AT_MKLDNN_ENABLED()\\n1592:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight, bias, weight = weight.contiguous(backend_memory_format);\\n1597:         bias = bias.defined() ? bias.contiguous() : bias;\\n1598:       }\\n1599:       output = at::mkldnn_convolution(\\n1600: (weight.is_cuda()) {\\\\n1766:         weight = weight.contiguous();\\\\n1767:       }\\\\n1768:       ggO = at::convolution(ggI, weight, Tensor(), params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, params.transposed, params.output_padding, params.groups);\\\\n1769:     }\\\\n1770: \\\\n1771:     if (ggW.defined()) {\\\\n1772:       if (ggW.is_cuda()) {\\\\n1773:         ggW = ggW.contiguous();\\\\n1774:       }\\\\n1775:       auto ggW_term = at::convolution(input, ggW, Tensor(), params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, params.transposed, params.output_padding, params.groups);\\\\n1776:       if (ggO.defined()) {\\\\n1777:         ggO = ggO + ggW_term;\\\\n1778:       } else {\\\\n1779:         ggO = ggW_term;\\\\n1780:       }\\\\n1781:     }\\\\n1782:   }\\\\n1783: \\\\n1784:   if (ggb.defined()) {\\\\n1785:     // View as (1, ggb.size(0), 1, 1...)\\\\n1786: \\\\n1787:     // Expand\\\\n1788:     std::vector\\\\u003cint64_t\\\\u003e new_size(gO.ndimension(), 1);\\\\n1789:     new_size[1] = ggb.sizes()[0];\\\\n1790:     auto ggb_contiguous = ggb.contiguous();\\\\n1791:     auto ggb_view = ggb_contiguous.view(new_size);\\\\n1792: \\\\n1793:     // Expand\\\\n1794:     auto ggb_expanded = ggb_view.expand(gO.sizes());\\\\n1795: \\\\n1796:     if (ggO.defined()) {\\\\n1797:       ggO = ggO + ggb_expanded;\\\\n1798:     } else {\\\\n1799:       ggO = ggb_expanded;\\\\n1800:     }\\\\n1801:   }\\\\n1802: \\\\n1803:   // Compute gW = conv(ggI, gO)\\\\n1804:   Tensor gW;\\\\n1805:   if (ggI.defined()) {\\\\n1806: \\\\n1807:     // Modified params with correct padding\\\\n1808:     ConvParams\\\\u003cint64_t\\\\u003e gw_conv_params(params);\\\\n1809: \\\\n1810:     // Disable groups as they are handled separately\\\\n1811:     auto groups = gw_conv_params.groups;\\\\n1812:     gw_conv_params.groups = 1;\\\\n1813:     std::swap(gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.stride);\\\\n1814: \\\\n1815:     // Transpose gO and ggI to accumulate over batch\\\\n1816:     auto gOt = gO.transpose(0, 1);\\\\n1817:     auto ggIt = ggI.transpose(0, 1);\\\\n1818: \\\\n1819:     Tensor gWt;\\\\n1820:     // Compute conv\\\\n1821:     if (input.numel() != 0) {\\\\n1822:       if (groups == 1) {\\\\n1823: \\\\n1824:         if (gOt.is_cuda()) {\\\\n1825:           gOt = gOt.contiguous();\\\\n1826:         }\\\\n1827:         // Compute conv\\\\n1828:         if (params.transposed) {\\\\n1829:           gw_conv_params.transposed = false;\\\\n1830:           gWt = at::convolution(gOt, ggIt, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\\\n1831:         } else {\\\\n1832:           gWt = at::convolution(ggIt, gOt, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\\\n1833:         }\\\\n1834:       } else {\\\\n1835:         std::vector\\\\u003cTensor\\\\u003e gWt_list(groups);\\\\n1836:         for (const auto g : c10::irange(groups)) {\\\\n1837:           auto ggIt_g = subvariable(ggIt, 0, groups, g);\\\\n1838:           auto gOt_g = subvariable(gOt, 0, groups, g);\\\\n1839:           if (gOt_g.is_cuda()) {\\\\n1840:             gOt_g = gOt_g.contiguous();\\\\n1841:           }\\\\n1842: \\\\n1843:           // Compute conv\\\\n1844:           if (params.transposed) {\\\\n1845:             gw_conv_params.transposed = false;\\\\n1846:             gWt_list[g] = at::convolution(gOt_g, ggIt_g, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\\\n1847:           } else {\\\\n1848:             gWt_list[g] = at::convolution(ggIt_g, gOt_g, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\\\n1849:           }\\\\n1850:         }\\\\n1851: \\\\n1852:         gWt = at::cat(gWt_list, 1);\\\\n1853:       }\\\\n1854: \\\\n1855:       // Transpose gW to match chan_in and chan_out\\\\n1856:       gW = gWt.transpose(0, 1);\\\\n1857: \\\\n1858:       // narrow gW to only relevant portion\\\\n1859:       // we do it this way instead of narrowing the input itself because\\\\n1860:       // the ConvForward kernels don't support asymmetric padding.\\\\n1861:       auto gW_size = gW.sizes();\\\\n1862:       auto w_size = weight.sizes();\\\\n1863:       for (const auto i : c10::irange(2, static_cast\\\\u003cint64_t\\\\u003e(gW_size.size()))) {\\\\n1864:         if (gW_size[i] \\\\u003e w_size[i]) {\\\\n1865:             gW = gW.narrow(i, 0, w_size[i]);\\\\n1866:             gW_size = gW.sizes();\\\\n1867:         }\\\\n1868:       }\\\\n1869:     }\\\\n1870:   }\\\\n1871: \\\\n1872:   // Compute gI = convT(gO, ggW) if !transposed\\\\n1873:   //         gI = conv(gO, ggw)  if transposed\\\\n1874:   Tensor gI;\\\\n1875:   if (input.numel() != 0) {\\\\n1876:     if (ggW.defined()) {\\\\n1877:       ConvParams\\\\u003cint64_t\\\\u003e gi_conv_params(params);\\\\n1878:       gi_conv_params.transposed = !params.transposed;\\\\n1879: \\\\n1880:       if (params.transposed) {\\\\n1881:         if (gO.is_cuda()) {\\\\n1882:           gO = gO.contiguous();\\\\n1883:         }\\\\n1884:         gI = at::convolution(gO, ggW, Tensor(), gi_conv_params.stride, gi_conv_params.padding, gi_conv_params.dilation, gi_conv_params.transposed, gi_conv_params.output_padding, gi_conv_params.groups);\\\\n1885: \\\\n1886:         // narrow gI to only relevant portion\\\\n1887:         // we do it this way because negative output_padding is not supported\\\\n1888:         // TODO: figure out if we can narrow gO and save some compute,\\\\n1889:         // rather than narrowing the computed gI\\\\n1890:         auto gI_size = gI.sizes();\\\\n1891:         auto i_size = input.sizes();\\\\n1892:         for (const auto i : c10::irange(2, static_cast\\\\u003cint64_t\\\\u003e(gI_size.size()))) {\\\\n1893:           if (gI_size[i] \\\\u003e i_size[i]) {\\\\n1894:             gI = gI.narrow(i, 0, i_size[i]);\\\\n1895:             gI_size = gI.sizes();\\\\n1896:           }\\\\n1897:         }\\\\n1898:       } else {\\\\n1899:         // calculate output_padding\\\\n1900:         // TODO: figure out why this needs to be computed...\\\\n1901:         auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\\\n1902:         auto input_shape = input.sizes().slice(2);\\\\n1903:         auto grad_output_shape = gO.sizes().slice(2);\\\\n1904: \\\\n1905:         for (const auto i : c10::irange(kernel_size.size())) {\\\\n1906:           // Check if whole input has been used or not\\\\n1907:           auto expected_input_shape = (kernel_size[i] - 1) * gi_conv_params.dilation[i]\\\\n1908:             - 2 * gi_conv_params.padding[i]\\\\n1909:             + (gi_conv_params.stride[i] * (grad_output_shape[i] - 1) + 1);\\\\n1910:           if (expected_input_shape != input_shape[i]) {\\\\n1911:             gi_conv_params.output_padding[i] = input_shape[i] - expected_input_shape;\\\\n1912:           }\\\\n1913:         }\\\\n1914: \\\\n1915:         if (gO.is_cuda()) {\\\\n1916:           gO = gO.contiguous();\\\\n1917:         }\\\\n1918: \\\\n1919:         gI = at::convolution(gO, ggW, Tensor(), gi_conv_params.stride, gi_conv_params.padding, gi_conv_params.dilation, gi_conv_params.transposed, gi_conv_params.output_padding, gi_conv_params.groups);\\\\n1920:       }\\\\n1921:     }\\\\n1922:   }\\\\n1923: \\\\n1924:   return std::tuple\\\\u003cTensor,Tensor,Tensor\\\\u003e{ggO, gI, gW};\\\\n1925: }\\\\n1926: \\\\n1927: static std::tuple\\\\u003cat::Tensor, at::Tensor, at::Tensor\\\\u003e _convolution_backward_nogroup_backend(\\\\n1928:     const Tensor\\\\u0026 grad_output,\\\\n1929:     const Tensor\\\\u0026 input,\\\\n1930:     const Tensor\\\\u0026 weight,\\\\n1931:     const std::array\\\\u003cbool, 3\\\\u003e output_mask,\\\\n1932:     const ConvBackend backend,\\\\n1933:     const ConvParams\\\\u003cint64_t\\\\u003e\\\\u0026 params) {\\\\n1934:   auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\\\n1935:   switch(backend) {\\\\n1936:     case ConvBackend::Slow2d:\\\\n1937:       return at::_slow_conv2d_backward(\\\\n1938:         grad_output, input, weight, kernel_size, params.stride, params.padding, output_mask);\\\\n1939:     // NB: nnpack backward does not support strided convolutions; use slow impl instead\\\\n1940:     case ConvBackend::NnpackSpatial:\\\\n1941:     case ConvBackend::SlowDilated2d:\\\\n1942:       return slow_conv_dilated2d_backward_stub(\\\\n1943:         input.device().type(),\\\\n1944:         grad_output, input, weight, kernel_size, params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, output_mask);\\\\n1945:     case ConvBackend::SlowDilated3d:\\\\n1946:       return slow_conv_dilated3d_backward_stub(\\\\n1947:         input.device().type(),\\\\n1948:         grad_output, input, weight, kernel_size, params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, output_mask);\\\\n1949:     case ConvBackend::SlowTranspose2d:\\\\n1950:       return slow_conv_transpose2d_backward_stub(\\\\n1951: \"annotations\": null, \"meta\": null}], \"structuredContent\": {\"content\": \"1700: at::Tensor _convolution(\\n1701:     const Tensor& input_r, const Tensor& weight_r, const std::optional<Tensor>& bias_r_opt,\\n1702:     IntArrayRef stride_, IntArrayRef padding_, IntArrayRef dilation_,\\n1703:     bool transposed_, IntArrayRef output_padding_, int64_t groups_,\\n1704:     bool benchmark, bool deterministic, bool cudnn_enabled)\\n1705: {\\n1706:   // See [Note: hacky wrapper removal for optional tensor]\\n1707:   c10::MaybeOwned<Tensor> bias_r_maybe_owned = at::borrow_from_optional_tensor(bias_r_opt);\\n1708:   const Tensor& bias_r = *bias_r_maybe_owned;\\n1709: \\n1710:   return at::_convolution(input_r, weight_r, bias_r, stride_, padding_, dilation_, transposed_, output_padding_, groups_, benchmark, deterministic, cudnn_enabled, at::globalContext().allowTF32CuDNN(\\\"conv\\\"));\\n1711: }\\n1712: \\n1713: std::tuple<Tensor, Tensor, Tensor> convolution_backward_overrideable(\\n1714:         const Tensor& grad_output, const Tensor& input, const Tensor& weight,\\n1715:         IntArrayRef stride, IntArrayRef padding, IntArrayRef dilation,\\n1716:         bool transposed, IntArrayRef output_padding, int64_t groups, std::array<bool, 3> output_mask) {\\n1717:    TORCH_CHECK_NOT_IMPLEMENTED(false, \\\"convolution_backward_overrideable: You are likely triggering this with tensor backend other than CPU/CUDA/MKLDNN, if this is intended, please use TORCH_LIBRARY_IMPL to override this function \\\");\\n1718:   return std::tuple<Tensor, Tensor, Tensor>(\\n1719:           at::empty_like(input, LEGACY_CONTIGUOUS_MEMORY_FORMAT),\\n1720:           at::empty_like(weight, LEGACY_CONTIGUOUS_MEMORY_FORMAT),\\n1721:           at::empty({}));\\n1722: }\\n1723: \\n1724: static Tensor subvariable(const Tensor& var, int64_t dim, int64_t groups, int64_t g) {\\n1725:   int64_t n = var.sizes()[dim] / groups;\\n1726:   auto result = var.narrow(dim, n * g, n);\\n1727:   return result;\\n1728: }\\n1729: \\n1730: std::tuple<Tensor,Tensor,Tensor> _convolution_double_backward( const std::optional<Tensor>& ggI_opt, const std::optional<Tensor>& ggW_r_opt, const std::optional<Tensor>& ggb_opt,\\n1731:     const Tensor& gO_r, const Tensor& weight_r, const Tensor& input,\\n1732:     IntArrayRef stride_, IntArrayRef padding_, IntArrayRef dilation_,\\n1733:     bool transposed_, IntArrayRef output_padding_, int64_t groups_,\\n1734:     std::array<bool, 3> output_mask) {\\n1735:   // See [Note: hacky wrapper removal for optional tensor]\\n1736:   c10::MaybeOwned<Tensor> ggI_maybe_owned = at::borrow_from_optional_tensor(ggI_opt);\\n1737:   const Tensor& ggI = *ggI_maybe_owned;\\n1738:   Tensor ggW = ggW_r_opt.value_or(Tensor());\\n1739:   const Tensor& ggb = ggb_opt.value_or(Tensor());\\n1740: \\n1741: \\n1742:   auto gO = gO_r;\\n1743:   auto weight = weight_r;\\n1744: \\n1745:   int64_t dim = weight.ndimension() - 2;\\n1746:   ConvParams<int64_t> params;\\n1747:   params.stride = expand_param_if_needed(stride_, \\\"stride\\\", dim);\\n1748:   params.padding = expand_param_if_needed(padding_, \\\"padding\\\", dim);\\n1749:   params.dilation = expand_param_if_needed(dilation_, \\\"dilation\\\", dim);\\n1750:   params.transposed = transposed_;\\n1751:   params.output_padding = expand_param_if_needed(output_padding_, \\\"output_padding\\\", dim);\\n1752:   // TODO: hacky way of inferring the groups number for grouped Conv3D\\n1753:   // See: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/pull/36355\\n1754:   if (!params.transposed && input.dim() > 4) {\\n1755:     // Avoid undefined behavior when num channels == 0; params are unused for that case.\\n1756:     params.groups = (weight.size(1) > 0) ? input.size(1) / weight.size(1) : -1;\\n1757:   } else {\\n1758:     params.groups = groups_;\\n1759:   }\\n1760: \\n1761:   // Compute ggO = conv(ggI, w) + conv(i, ggW) + ggb\\n1762:   Tensor ggO;\\n1763:   if (input.numel() != 0) {\\n1764:     if (ggI.defined()) {\\n1765:       if (weight.is_cuda()) {\\n1766:         weight = weight.contiguous();\\n1767:       }\\n1768:       ggO = at::convolution(ggI, weight, Tensor(), params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, params.transposed, params.output_padding, params.groups);\\n1769:     }\\n1770: \\n1771:     if (ggW.defined()) {\\n1772:       if (ggW.is_cuda()) {\\n1773:         ggW = ggW.contiguous();\\n1774:       }\\n1775:       auto ggW_term = at::convolution(input, ggW, Tensor(), params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, params.transposed, params.output_padding, params.groups);\\n1776:       if (ggO.defined()) {\\n1777:         ggO = ggO + ggW_term;\\n1778:       } else {\\n1779:         ggO = ggW_term;\\n1780:       }\\n1781:     }\\n1782:   }\\n1783: \\n1784:   if (ggb.defined()) {\\n1785:     // View as (1, ggb.size(0), 1, 1...)\\n1786: \\n1787:     // Expand\\n1788:     std::vector<int64_t> new_size(gO.ndimension(), 1);\\n1789:     new_size[1] = ggb.sizes()[0];\\n1790:     auto ggb_contiguous = ggb.contiguous();\\n1791:     auto ggb_view = ggb_contiguous.view(new_size);\\n1792: \\n1793:     // Expand\\n1794:     auto ggb_expanded = ggb_view.expand(gO.sizes());\\n1795: \\n1796:     if (ggO.defined()) {\\n1797:       ggO = ggO + ggb_expanded;\\n1798:     } else {\\n1799:       ggO = ggb_expanded;\\n1800:     }\\n1801:   }\\n1802: \\n1803:   // Compute gW = conv(ggI, gO)\\n1804:   Tensor gW;\\n1805:   if (ggI.defined()) {\\n1806: \\n1807:     // Modified params with correct padding\\n1808:     ConvParams<int64_t> gw_conv_params(params);\\n1809: \\n1810:     // Disable groups as they are handled separately\\n1811:     auto groups = gw_conv_params.groups;\\n1812:     gw_conv_params.groups = 1;\\n1813:     std::swap(gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.stride);\\n1814: \\n1815:     // Transpose gO and ggI to accumulate over batch\\n1816:     auto gOt = gO.transpose(0, 1);\\n1817:     auto ggIt = ggI.transpose(0, 1);\\n1818: \\n1819:     Tensor gWt;\\n1820:     // Compute conv\\n1821:     if (input.numel() != 0) {\\n1822:       if (groups == 1) {\\n1823: \\n1824:         if (gOt.is_cuda()) {\\n1825:           gOt = gOt.contiguous();\\n1826:         }\\n1827:         // Compute conv\\n1828:         if (params.transposed) {\\n1829:           gw_conv_params.transposed = false;\\n1830:           gWt = at::convolution(gOt, ggIt, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\n1831:         } else {\\n1832:           gWt = at::convolution(ggIt, gOt, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\n1833:         }\\n1834:       } else {\\n1835:         std::vector<Tensor> gWt_list(groups);\\n1836:         for (const auto g : c10::irange(groups)) {\\n1837:           auto ggIt_g = subvariable(ggIt, 0, groups, g);\\n1838:           auto gOt_g = subvariable(gOt, 0, groups, g);\\n1839:           if (gOt_g.is_cuda()) {\\n1840:             gOt_g = gOt_g.contiguous();\\n1841:           }\\n1842: \\n1843:           // Compute conv\\n1844:           if (params.transposed) {\\n1845:             gw_conv_params.transposed = false;\\n1846:             gWt_list[g] = at::convolution(gOt_g, ggIt_g, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\n1847:           } else {\\n1848:             gWt_list[g] = at::convolution(ggIt_g, gOt_g, Tensor(), gw_conv_params.stride, gw_conv_params.padding, gw_conv_params.dilation, gw_conv_params.transposed, gw_conv_params.output_padding, gw_conv_params.groups);\\n1849:           }\\n1850:         }\\n1851: \\n1852:         gWt = at::cat(gWt_list, 1);\\n1853:       }\\n1854: \\n1855:       // Transpose gW to match chan_in and chan_out\\n1856:       gW = gWt.transpose(0, 1);\\n1857: \\n1858:       // narrow gW to only relevant portion\\n1859:       // we do it this way instead of narrowing the input itself because\\n1860:       // the ConvForward kernels don't support asymmetric padding.\\n1861:       auto gW_size = gW.sizes();\\n1862:       auto w_size = weight.sizes();\\n1863:       for (const auto i : c10::irange(2, static_cast<int64_t>(gW_size.size()))) {\\n1864:         if (gW_size[i] > w_size[i]) {\\n1865:             gW = gW.narrow(i, 0, w_size[i]);\\n1866:             gW_size = gW.sizes();\\n1867:         }\\n1868:       }\\n1869:     }\\n1870:   }\\n1871: \\n1872:   // Compute gI = convT(gO, ggW) if !transposed\\n1873:   //         gI = conv(gO, ggw)  if transposed\\n1874:   Tensor gI;\\n1875:   if (input.numel() != 0) {\\n1876:     if (ggW.defined()) {\\n1877:       ConvParams<int64_t> gi_conv_params(params);\\n1878:       gi_conv_params.transposed = !params.transposed;\\n1879: \\n1880:       if (params.transposed) {\\n1881:         if (gO.is_cuda()) {\\n1882:           gO = gO.contiguous();\\n1883:         }\\n1884:         gI = at::convolution(gO, ggW, Tensor(), gi_conv_params.stride, gi_conv_params.padding, gi_conv_params.dilation, gi_conv_params.transposed, gi_conv_params.output_padding, gi_conv_params.groups);\\n1885: \\n1886:         // narrow gI to only relevant portion\\n1887:         // we do it this way because negative output_padding is not supported\\n1888:         // TODO: figure out if we can narrow gO and save some compute,\\n1889:         // rather than narrowing the computed gI\\n1890:         auto gI_size = gI.sizes();\\n1891:         auto i_size = input.sizes();\\n1892:         for (const auto i : c10::irange(2, static_cast<int64_t>(gI_size.size()))) {\\n1893:           if (gI_size[i] > i_size[i]) {\\n1894:             gI = gI.narrow(i, 0, i_size[i]);\\n1895:             gI_size = gI.sizes();\\n1896:           }\\n1897:         }\\n1898:       } else {\\n1899:         // calculate output_padding\\n1900:         // TODO: figure out why this needs to be computed...\\n1901:         auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\n1902:         auto input_shape = input.sizes().slice(2);\\n1903:         auto grad_output_shape = gO.sizes().slice(2);\\n1904: \\n1905:         for (const auto i : c10::irange(kernel_size.size())) {\\n1906:           // Check if whole input has been used or not\\n1907:           auto expected_input_shape = (kernel_size[i] - 1) * gi_conv_params.dilation[i]\\n1908:             - 2 * gi_conv_params.padding[i]\\n1909:             + (gi_conv_params.stride[i] * (grad_output_shape[i] - 1) + 1);\\n1910:           if (expected_input_shape != input_shape[i]) {\\n1911:             gi_conv_params.output_padding[i] = input_shape[i] - expected_input_shape;\\n1912:           }\\n1913:         }\\n1914: \\n1915:         if (gO.is_cuda()) {\\n1916:           gO = gO.contiguous();\\n1917:         }\\n1918: \\n1919:         gI = at::convolution(gO, ggW, Tensor(), gi_conv_params.stride, gi_conv_params.padding, gi_conv_params.dilation, gi_conv_params.transposed, gi_conv_params.output_padding, gi_conv_params.groups);\\n1920:       }\\n1921:     }\\n1922:   }\\n1923: \\n1924:   return std::tuple<Tensor,Tensor,Tensor>{ggO, gI, gW};\\n1925: }\\n1926: \\n1927: static std::tuple<at::Tensor, at::Tensor, at::Tensor> _convolution_backward_nogroup_backend(\\n1928:     const Tensor& grad_output,\\n1929:     const Tensor& input,\\n1930:     const Tensor& weight,\\n1931:     const std::array<bool, 3> output_mask,\\n1932:     const ConvBackend backend,\\n1933:     const ConvParams<int64_t>& params) {\\n1934:   auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\n1935:   switch(backend) {\\n1936:     case ConvBackend::Slow2d:\\n1937:       return at::_slow_conv2d_backward(\\n1938:         grad_output, input, weight, kernel_size, params.stride, params.padding, output_mask);\\n1939:     // NB: nnpack backward does not support strided convolutions; use slow impl instead\\n1940:     case ConvBackend::NnpackSpatial:\\n1941:     case ConvBackend::SlowDilated2d:\\n1942:       return slow_conv_dilated2d_backward_stub(\\n1943: This function supports 1D, 2D, or 3D spatial convolution and currently requires\\\\n1964: // a single batch dimension to be present.\\\\n1965: //\\\\n1966: // Args:\\\\n1967: //   grad_output_: tensor of shape (N, C_out, L_out), (N, C_out, H_out, W_out), or (N, C_out, D_out, H_out, W_out)\\\\n1968: //   input_: tensor of shape (N, C_in, L_in), (N, C_in, H_in, W_in), or (N, C_in, D_in, H_in, W_in)\\\\n1969: //   weight_: tensor of shape (C_out, C_in // groups, *kernel_size); dimension of kernel_size must match the number\\\\n1970: //       of input spatial dimensions\\\\n1971: //   bias_sizes_opt: if specified, indicates that a bias was used in the forward pass and contains the shape\\\\n1972: //       of the bias. While the bias shape can be computed from other inputs, it is provided to this function for\\\\n1973: //       ease of use. The bias shape is (weight.shape[0]) for normal convolution and (weight.shape[1] * groups)\\\\n1974: //       for transposed convolution.\\\\n1975: //   stride: single value or an array with dimension matching the number of input spatial dimensions\\\\n1976: //   padding: single value or an array with dimension matching the number of input spatial dimensions\\\\n1977: //   dilation: single value or an array with dimension matching the number of input spatial dimensions\\\\n1978: //   transposed: boolean indicating whether the convolution is transposed\\\\n1979: //   output_padding: single value or dimension == number of input spatial dimensions; only supported when\\\\n1980: //       transposed is true\\\\n1981: //   groups: number of groups for grouped convolution\\\\n1982: //   output_mask: 3-dim boolean array specifying which gradients to compute in input, weight, bias order\\\\n1983: std::tuple\\\\u003cTensor, Tensor, Tensor\\\\u003e convolution_backward(\\\\n1984: This function supports 1D, 2D, or 3D spatial convolution and currently requires\\n1964: // a single batch dimension to be present.\\n1965: //\\n1966: // Args:\\n1967: //   grad_output_: tensor of shape (N, C_out, L_out), (N, C_out, H_out, W_out), or (N, C_out, D_out, H_out, W_out)\\n1968: //   input_: tensor of shape (N, C_in, L_in), (N, C_in, H_in, W_in), or (N, C_in, D_in, H_in, W_in)\\n1969: //   weight_: tensor of shape (C_out, C_in // groups, *kernel_size); dimension of kernel_size must match the number\\n1970: //       of input spatial dimensions\\n1971: //   bias_sizes_opt: if specified, indicates that a bias was used in the forward pass and contains the shape\\n1972: //       of the bias. While the bias shape can be computed from other inputs, it is provided to this function for\\n1973: //       ease of use. The bias shape is (weight.shape[0]) for normal convolution and (weight.shape[1] * groups)\\n1974: //       for transposed convolution.\\n1975: //   stride: single value or an array with dimension matching the number of input spatial dimensions\\n1976: //   padding: single value or an array with dimension matching the number of input spatial dimensions\\n1977: //   dilation: single value or an array with dimension matching the number of input spatial dimensions\\n1978: //   transposed: boolean indicating whether the convolution is transposed\\n1979: //   output_padding: single value or dimension == number of input spatial dimensions; only supported when\\n1980: //       transposed is true\\n1981: //   groups: number of groups for grouped convolution\\n1982: //   output_mask: 3-dim boolean array specifying which gradients to compute in input, weight, bias order\\n1983: std::tuple<Tensor, Tensor, Tensor> convolution_backward(\\n1984:     const Tensor& grad_output_, const Tensor& input_, const Tensor& weight_,\\n1985:     const at::OptionalIntArrayRef bias_sizes_opt,\\n1986:     IntArrayRef stride, IntArrayRef padding, IntArrayRef dilation, bool transposed, IntArrayRef output_padding,\\n1987:     int64_t groups, std::array<bool, 3> output_mask) {\\n1988:   auto grad_output = grad_output_;\\n1989:   auto input = input_;\\n1990:   auto weight = weight_;\\n1991: \\n1992:   auto k = weight.ndimension();\\n1993:   int64_t dim = k - 2;\\n1994: \\n1995:   TORCH_CHECK(dim > 0, \\\"weight should have at least three dimensions\\\");\\n1996: \\n1997:   auto& ctx = at::globalContext();\\n1998:   ConvParams<int64_t> params;\\n1999:   params.stride = expand_param_if_needed(stride, \\\"stride\\\", dim);\\n2000:   params.padding = expand_param_if_needed(padding, \\\"padding\\\", dim);\\n2001:   params.dilation = expand_param_if_needed(dilation, \\\"dilation\\\", dim);\\n2002:   params.transposed = transposed;\\n2003:   params.output_padding = expand_param_if_needed(output_padding, \\\"output_padding\\\", dim);\\n2004:   params.groups = groups;\\n2005:   params.benchmark = ctx.benchmarkCuDNN();\\n2006:   params.deterministic = ctx.deterministicCuDNN() || ctx.deterministicAlgorithms();\\n2007:   params.cudnn_enabled = ctx.userEnabledCuDNN();\\n2008:   params.allow_tf32 = ctx.allowTF32CuDNN(\\\"conv\\\");\\n2009: \\n2010:   // Validate inputs.\\n2011:   check_shape_backward(input, weight.sizes(), params);\\n2012:   TORCH_CHECK(input.dim() == grad_output.dim(),\\n2013:       \\\"Expected input and grad_output to have the same number of dimensions, but got: \\\",\\n2014:       input.dim(), \\\" and \\\", grad_output.dim());\\n2015: \\n2016:   // output_padding is only supported for transposed convolutions\\n2017:   if (!params.transposed) {\\n2018:     for (auto pad : params.output_padding) {\\n2019:       TORCH_CHECK(pad == 0, \\\"output_padding is not supported for non-transposed convolutions; got: \\\",\\n2020:         params.output_padding);\\n2021:     }\\n2022:   }\\n2023: \\n2024:   // Expand 1d -> 2d.\\n2025:   // This is only done for backends that don't natively support 1d spatial input.\\n2026:   if (k == 3 && !input.is_mkldnn() && !input.is_xpu()) {\\n2027:     // avoid accidentally going through NHWC for permuted 3d input.\\n2028:     input = input.contiguous();\\n2029:     params.view1d_as_2d();\\n2030:     grad_output = view4d(grad_output);\\n2031:     input = view4d(input);\\n2032:     weight = view4d(weight);\\n2033:   }\\n2034: \\n2035:   // Select appropriate backend to use.\\n2036:   ConvBackend backend = select_conv_backend(input, weight, bias_sizes_opt, /*need_backward=*/ true, params);\\n2037:   at::MemoryFormat backend_memory_format = determine_backend_memory_format(input, weight, backend);\\n2038: \\n2039:   // Call the backend.\\n2040:   Tensor backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight, backend_grad_bias;\\n2041:   auto kernel_size = weight.sizes().slice(2);\\n2042:   switch(backend) {\\n2043:     case ConvBackend::CudaDepthwise2d:\\n2044:     {\\n2045:       std::array<bool, 2> input_weight_output_mask = {output_mask[0], output_mask[1]};\\n2046:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight) =\\n2047:         conv_depthwise2d_backward_stub(input.device().type(), grad_output, input,\\n2048:           weight, kernel_size, params.stride, params.padding, params.dilation, input_weight_output_mask);\\n2049:       break;\\n2050:     }\\n2051:     case ConvBackend::CudaDepthwise3d:\\n2052:       TORCH_CHECK(input.ndimension() == 5);\\n2053:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight, backend_grad_bias) =\\n2054:         conv_depthwise3d_backward_stub(\\n2055:           input.device().type(), grad_output, input, weight, kernel_size, params.stride,\\n2056:           params.padding, params.dilation, output_mask);\\n2057:       break;\\n2058:     case ConvBackend::Cudnn:\\n2059:     {\\n2060:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight);\\n2061:       std::array<bool, 2> input_weight_output_mask = {output_mask[0], output_mask[1]};\\n2062:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight) = cudnn_convolution_backward_stub(\\n2063:           input.device().type(),\\n2064:           // Only make input contiguous when it is necessary for the backwards computation\\n2065:           output_mask[1] ? input.contiguous(backend_memory_format) : input,\\n2066:           grad_output, weight, params.padding, params.stride,\\n2067:           params.dilation, params.groups, params.benchmark, params.deterministic, params.allow_tf32,\\n2068:           input_weight_output_mask);\\n2069:       break;\\n2070:     }\\n2071:     case ConvBackend::Mps:\\n2072:     {\\n2073: #ifdef USE_MPS\\n2074:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight);\\n2075:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight, backend_grad_bias) =\\n2076:         at::mps_convolution_backward(input, grad_output, weight, params.padding,\\n2077:           params.stride, params.dilation, params.groups, output_mask);\\n2078: #else\\n2079:       TORCH_INTERNAL_ASSERT(false, \\\"MPS backend was selected in PyTorch without support\\\");\\n2080: #endif\\n2081:       break;\\n2082:     }\\n2083:     case ConvBackend::MpsTranspose:\\n2084:     {\\n2085: #ifdef USE_MPS\\n2086:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight);\\n2087:       std::array<bool, 2> input_weight_output_mask = {output_mask[0], output_mask[1]};\\n2088:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight) = at::mps_convolution_transpose_backward(\\n2089:         // Only make input contiguous when it is necessary for the backwards computation\\n2090:         output_mask[1] ? input.contiguous(backend_memory_format) : input,\\n2091:         grad_output, weight, params.padding, params.output_padding,\\n2092:         params.stride, params.dilation, params.groups, input_weight_output_mask);\\n2093: #else\\n2094:       TORCH_INTERNAL_ASSERT(false, \\\"MPS backend was selected in PyTorch without support\\\");\\n2095: #endif\\n2096:       break;\\n2097:     }\\n2098:     case ConvBackend::CudnnTranspose:\\n2099:     {\\n2100:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight);\\n2101:       std::array<bool, 2> input_weight_output_mask = {output_mask[0], output_mask[1]};\\n2102:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight) = cudnn_convolution_transpose_backward_stub(\\n2103:         input.device().type(),\\n2104:         // Only make input contiguous when it is necessary for the backwards computation\\n2105:         output_mask[1] ? input.contiguous(backend_memory_format) : input,\\n2106:         grad_output, weight, params.padding, params.output_padding,\\n2107:         params.stride, params.dilation, params.groups, params.benchmark, params.deterministic, params.allow_tf32,\\n2108:         input_weight_output_mask);\\n2109:       break;\\n2110:     }\\n2111:     case ConvBackend::Empty:\\n2112:       if (output_mask[0]) {\\n2113:         backend_grad_input = at::zeros_like(input);\\n2114:       }\\n2115:       if (output_mask[1]) {\\n2116:         backend_grad_weight = at::zeros_like(weight);\\n2117:       }\\n2118:       if (output_mask[2]) {\\n2119:         backend_grad_bias = at::zeros(*bias_sizes_opt, weight.options());\\n2120:       }\\n2121:       break;\\n2122:     case ConvBackend::MkldnnEmpty:\\n2123: #if AT_MKLDNN_ENABLED()\\n2124:       if (output_mask[0]) {\\n2125:         if (input.is_mkldnn()) {\\n2126:           backend_grad_input = empty_mkldnn(input.sizes(), optTypeMetaToScalarType(input.options().dtype_opt()),\\n2127:               input.options().layout_opt(), input.options().device_opt(), input.options().pinned_memory_opt());\\n2128:           backend_grad_input.zero_();\\n2129:         } else {\\n2130:           backend_grad_input = at::zeros_like(input);\\n2131:         }\\n2132:       }\\n2133:       if (output_mask[1]) {\\n2134:         // mkldnn weight is not supported during training by the mkldnn backend\\n2135:         backend_grad_weight = at::zeros_like(weight);\\n2136:       }\\n2137:       if (output_mask[2]) {\\n2138:         // mkldnn bias is not supported during training by the mkldnn backend\\n2139:         backend_grad_bias = at::zeros(*bias_sizes_opt, weight.options());\\n2140:       }\\n2141: #else\\n2142:       TORCH_INTERNAL_ASSERT(false, \\\"Mkldnn backend was selected in PyTorch compiled without mkldnn support\\\");\\n2143: #endif\\n2144:       break;\\n2145:     case ConvBackend::Miopen:\\n2146:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight);\\n2147:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight, backend_grad_bias) =\\n2148:         miopen_convolution_backward_stub(\\n2149:           input.device().type(),\\n2150:           input.contiguous(backend_memory_format), grad_output, weight, params.padding, params.stride,\\n2151:           params.dilation, params.groups, params.benchmark, params.deterministic, output_mask);\\n2152:       break;\\n2153:     case ConvBackend::MiopenDepthwise:\\n2154:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight, backend_grad_bias) =\\n2155:           miopen_depthwise_convolution_backward_stub(\\n2156:             input.device().type(),\\n2157: output_mask);\\n2159:       break;\\n2160:     case ConvBackend::MiopenTranspose:\\n2161:       check_input_same_type_as_parameters(input, weight);\\n2162:       std::tie(backend_grad_input, backend_grad_weight, backend_grad_bias) =\\n2163:         miopen_convolution_transpose_backward_stub(\\n2164:           input.device().type(),\\n2165: <ATen/ops/conv_transpose2d_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/conv_transpose3d_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution_backward_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution_backward_overrideable.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution_backward_overrideable_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution_overrideable.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/convolution_overrideable_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/cudnn_convolution.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/cudnn_convolution_transpose.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/empty.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/empty_like.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/empty_native.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/miopen_convolution.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/miopen_convolution_transpose.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/miopen_depthwise_convolution.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/mkldnn_convolution.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/mps_convolution_backward.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/mps_convolution_transpose_backward.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/slow_conv3d.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/slow_conv_dilated2d.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/slow_conv_dilated3d.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/slow_conv_transpose2d.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/slow_conv_transpose3d.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/thnn_conv2d.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/view_as_real.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/zeros.h>\n#include <ATen/ops/zeros_like.h>\n#endif\n\nconstexpr int MIOPEN_DIM_MAX = 5;\n\nnamespace at::native {\n\n\nstatic bool conv_benchmark_empty_cache = true;\n\n// Check workload to activate fast depthwise FP16 cudnn conv kernels\ntemplate <typename T>\nstatic bool check_cudnn_depthwise_workload(const at::Tensor& input, T stride) {\n  auto w = at::symint::size<T>(input, 3);  // same as h\n  auto ch = at::symint::size<T>(input, 1);\n  auto bs = at::symint::size<T>(input, 0);\n  if (stride==1) {\n    if (w >= 7) {\n      // All batch sizes and nb_channels\n      if (w >= 112) {\n        return true;\n      }\n\n      // large nb_channels\n      if (ch >= 1024) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if (w >= 56) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (bs >= 32) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // batch_size specific\n      if (bs >= 128) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if (ch >= 512) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (ch >= 64) {\n          if (w >= 14) {\n            return true;\n          }\n        } else if ((ch >= 32) && (w >=28)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 64) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 256) && (w >= 14)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if ((ch >= 32) && (w >= 28)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 32) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 256) && (w >= 14)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if ((ch >= 128) && (w >= 28)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if ((ch >= 32) && (w >= 56)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 16) {\n        if ((ch >= 1024) && (w >= 14)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 256) && (w >= 28)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if ((ch >= 32) && (w >= 56)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 8) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 512) && (w >= 28)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if ((ch >= 64) && (w >= 56)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  } else if (stride==2) {\n    if (ch < 256) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (w >= 7) {\n      if (bs >= 128) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if (ch >= 1024) {\n          return true;\n        } else if ((ch >= 512) && (w >= 14)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (w >= 28) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 64) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 512) && (w >= 14)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (w >= 28) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 32) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 1024) && (w >= 14)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (w >= 28) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 16) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 512) && (w >= 28)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (w >= 56) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 8) {\n        // NOLINTNEXTLINE(bugprone-branch-clone,cppcoreguidelines-avoid-magic-numbers)\n        if ((ch >= 1024) && (w >= 28)) {\n          return true;\n        } else if (w >= 56) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      } else if (bs >= 1) {\n        if ((ch >= 512) && (w >=112)) {\n          return true;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return false;\n}\n\n// simplified version for cudnn 8.2 and above\ntemplate <typename T>\nstatic bool check_cudnn_depthwise_workload_with_filter(const at::Tensor& input, T stride, const at::Tensor& weight) {\n  // 1D conv\n  if(at::symint::size<T>(input, 2) == 1 && stride == 1){\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  // 2d conv\n  // only square filters\n  if (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 2) != at::symint::size<T>(weight, 3)) return false;\n  auto filter = at::symint::size<T>(weight, 3);\n  // only 1/3/5 filter\n  if (filter != 1 && filter != 3 && filter != 5) return false;\n  // we don't enforce square input but only check width to reduce heuristic space\n  if (at::symint::size<T>(input, 3) < 7) return false; // min width 7\n  auto w = at::symint::size<T>(input, 3);\n  // only 1/2 stride, use cudnn for all stride 1\n  if (stride == 1) return true;\n  if (stride != 2) return false;\n\n  auto ch = at::symint::size<T>(input, 1);\n  auto bs = at::symint::size<T>(input, 0);\n  // special case since bs1 show good perf in lots of cases\n  if (bs == 1) {\n    if (filter == 1 && w <= 28) return true;\n    if (filter == 3 || filter == 5) return true;\n  } else {\n    if (filter == 1 && bs <= 16 && ch >= 128 && w <= 7) return true;\n    if (filter == 3 || filter == 5) {\n      if ((ch >= 512) || (ch >= 256 && w >= 28)) return true;\n    }\n  }\n  return false;\n}\n\n\n#if defined(C10_MOBILE)\nstatic bool xnnpack_use_convolution2d(\n    const Tensor& input,\n    const Tensor& weight,\n    const at::OptionalIntArrayRef bias_sizes_opt,\n    const IntArrayRef padding,\n    const IntArrayRef stride,\n    const IntArrayRef dilation,\n    const int64_t groups,\n    const bool transposed) {\n  return xnnpack::use_convolution2d(input, weight, bias_sizes_opt, padding, stride, dilation, groups, transposed);\n}\n\nstatic bool xnnpack_use_convolution2d(\n    const Tensor& input,\n    const Tensor& weight,\n    const at::OptionalSymIntArrayRef bias_sizes_opt,\n    const SymIntArrayRef padding,\n    const SymIntArrayRef stride,\n    const SymIntArrayRef dilation,\n    const c10::SymInt groups,\n    const bool transposed) {\n  // Never use xnnpack for symbolic tracing\n  return false;\n}\n#endif\n\n// This struct is templated so that we can run backend selection in a dynamic\n// shapes context; all of the real kernel selection in eager mode runs with\n// int64_t\ntemplate <typename T>\nstruct ConvParams {\n  std::vector<T> stride;\n  std::vector<T> padding;\n  std::vector<T> dilation;\n  bool transposed{};\n  std::vector<T> output_padding;\n  T groups{};\n  bool benchmark{};\n  bool deterministic{};\n  bool cudnn_enabled{};\n  bool allow_tf32{};\n\n  bool is_strided() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      stride.cbegin(), stride.cend(), [](const T& s) { return s != 1; });\n  }\n\n  bool is_dilated() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      dilation.cbegin(), dilation.cend(), [](const T& d) { return d != 1; });\n  }\n\n  bool is_padded() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      padding.cbegin(), padding.cend(), [](const T& p) { return p != 0; });\n  }\n\n  bool is_output_padding_neg() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      output_padding.cbegin(),\n      output_padding.cend(),\n      [](const T& p) { return p < 0; });\n  }\n\n  bool is_output_padding_big() const {\n    // Revisit this with std::views::zip at C++20.\n    for (auto i: c10::irange(output_padding.size())) {\n      if (output_padding[i] >= stride[i]) {\n        return true;\n      }\n    }\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  bool is_padding_neg() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      padding.cbegin(), padding.cend(), [](const T& p) { return p < 0; });\n  }\n\n  bool is_dilation_neg() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      dilation.cbegin(), dilation.cend(), [](const T& d) { return d < 0; });\n  }\n\n  bool is_stride_nonpos() const {\n    return std::any_of(\n      stride.cbegin(), stride.cend(), [](const T& s) { return s <= 0; });\n  }\n\n  void view1d_as_2d() {\n    if (stride.size() == 1) {\n      stride.insert(stride.begin(), 1);\n      padding.insert(padding.begin(), 0);\n      dilation.insert(dilation.begin(), 1);\n      output_padding.insert(output_padding.begin(), 0);\n    }\n  }\n\n  bool use_cpu_depthwise3x3_winograd(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight, const std::optional<at::Tensor>& bias) const {\n#if defined(__ARM_NEON__) || (defined(__riscv_v_intrinsic) && __riscv_v_intrinsic>=12000)\n    // Currently only 3x3 depthwise convolutions on tensors of float are supported.\n    return (input.ndimension() == 4) &&\n           (at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == groups) &&\n           (weight.ndimension() == 4 ) &&\n           (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 0) % at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == 0) &&\n           (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 1) == 1) &&\n           (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 2) == 3) &&\n           (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 3) == 3) &&\n           (input.device().is_cpu()) &&\n           (input.scalar_type() == at::kFloat) &&\n           input.is_contiguous() &&\n           (weight.device().is_cpu()) &&\n           (weight.scalar_type() == at::kFloat) &&\n           weight.is_contiguous() &&\n           (!bias.has_value() || bias->is_contiguous()) &&\n           !is_strided() &&\n           !is_dilated() &&\n           !transposed;\n#else\n    return false;\n#endif\n  }\n\n  bool needs_64bit_indexing_no_split(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const {\n    constexpr int64_t int_max = std::numeric_limits<int>::max();\n    auto numel_input = at::symint::numel<T>(input);\n    // empty input\n    if (numel_input == 0) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    // input size can not be reduced to the range of int by splitting the batch dim\n    auto n = at::symint::size<T>(input, 0);\n    if (numel_input / n > int_max) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    // output size can not be reduced to the range of int by splitting the batch dim\n    T outsize = 1;\n    if (transposed) {\n      auto o = conv_input_size(at::symint::sizes<T>(input), at::symint::sizes<T>(weight), padding, output_padding, stride, dilation, groups);\n      outsize = c10::multiply_integers(o.begin() + 1, o.end());\n    } else {\n      auto o = conv_output_size(at::symint::sizes<T>(input), at::symint::sizes<T>(weight), padding, stride, dilation);\n      outsize = c10::multiply_integers(o.begin() + 1, o.end());\n    }\n    return outsize > int_max;\n  }\n\n  bool use_cudnn(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const {\n  // Note [Mobile check segfaults]\n  // cudnn and miopen are guaranteed not to be on mobile, and T102591915 / T110194934 suggest\n  // that maybe the compiledWithCuDNN() check sometimes segfaults (though I can't imagine how)\n#if !defined(C10_MOBILE)\n    if (!detail::getCUDAHooks().compiledWithCuDNN() || !input.is_cuda() || !cudnn_enabled) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    static long cudnn_version = detail::getCUDAHooks().versionRuntimeCuDNN();\n    // broken on cuDNN 9.8 - 9.14\n    if (cudnn_version >= 90800 && cudnn_version < 91500) {\n      if (cudnn_conv_suggest_memory_format(input, weight) == at::MemoryFormat::Contiguous &&\n          (input.scalar_type() == at::kBFloat16 || input.scalar_type() == at::kHalf) &&\n          weight.dim() == 5) {\n        for (int i = 2; i < weight.dim(); i++) {\n          if (weight.size(i) != 1) {\n            return false;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    if (needs_64bit_indexing_no_split(input, weight)) {\n      if (!(cudnn_version >= 90300 && at::native::cudnnv8_enabled_check_debug())) {\n        TORCH_WARN_ONCE(\"cuDNN cannot be used for large non-batch-splittable convolutions\"\n                        \" if the V8 API is not enabled or before cuDNN version 9.3+.\"\n                        \" Consider upgrading cuDNN and/or enabling the V8 API for better efficiency.\");\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n    if (input.scalar_type() == at::kBFloat16 || weight.scalar_type() == at::kBFloat16) {\n      if (!(detail::getCUDAHooks().supportsBFloat16ConvolutionWithCuDNNv8() && at::native::cudnnv8_enabled_check_debug())) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n    if (cudnn_conv_suggest_memory_format(input, weight) == at::MemoryFormat::Contiguous) {\n      if (is_dilated()) {\n        return detail::getCUDAHooks().supportsDilatedConvolutionWithCuDNN() && !is_output_padding_big();\n      }\n    }\n    return !is_output_padding_big();\n#else\n    return false;\n#endif\n  }\n\n  // Use cudnn for FP16 depthwise convolutions\n  bool use_cudnn_depthwise(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const  {\n    if (!cudnn_enabled || !detail::getCUDAHooks().compiledWithCuDNN() || !input.is_cuda()) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    // native kernel doesn't support 64-bit non-splittable case\n    if (!(canUse32BitIndexMath(input) && canUse32BitIndexMath(weight))) {\n      static long cudnn_version = detail::getCUDAHooks().compiledWithCuDNN() ? detail::getCUDAHooks().versionRuntimeCuDNN() : -1;\n      // TODO(eqy): remove this once cuDNN fixes 64-bit depthwise support, first broken in 9.11x\n      if (cudnn_conv_suggest_memory_format(input, weight) != at::MemoryFormat::Contiguous) {\n        if (cudnn_version < 0 || cudnn_version > 91000) {\n          return false;\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (!(cudnn_version >= 90300 && at::native::cudnnv8_enabled_check_debug())) {\n        TORCH_WARN_ONCE(\"cuDNN cannot be used for large non-batch-splittable convolutions\"\n                        \" if the V8 API is not enabled or before cuDNN version 9.3+.\"\n                        \" Upgrade cuDNN or enable the V8 API to use cuDNN for 64-bit depthwise convolutions.\");\n        return false;\n      } else {\n        return true;\n      }\n    }\n    if (cudnn_conv_suggest_memory_format(input, weight) != at::MemoryFormat::Contiguous) {\n      // always use cudnn_depthwise for channels_last format\n      return true;\n    }\n    if (detail::getCUDAHooks().supportsDepthwiseConvolutionWithCuDNN()) {\n      bool kernel_cond =  (use_cudnn(input, weight) &&\n                           input.scalar_type() == kHalf && // only for FP16\n                           weight.scalar_type() == kHalf &&\n                           is_depthwise(input, weight) &&\n                           input.ndimension() == 4 &&   // TODO: 5-D contiguous depthwise is not supported yet, need benchmarks\n                           !is_dilated() && // no dilation supported\n                           (stride[0] == stride[1] || at::symint::size<T>(input, 2) == 1) && // square or 1d\n                           at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) >= 32); // min 32 channels supported)\n      if (kernel_cond) {\n        return check_cudnn_depthwise_workload_with_filter<T>(input, stride[1], weight);\n      }\n      return false;\n    } else {\n      return false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  bool use_miopen(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight, bool bias_defined) const  {\n    if (needs_64bit_indexing_no_split(input, weight)) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    return ((input.scalar_type() == at::kFloat) || (input.scalar_type() == at::kHalf) || (input.scalar_type() == at::kBFloat16))\n           && cudnn_enabled\n           && input.is_cuda()\n           && detail::getCUDAHooks().compiledWithMIOpen()\n           && input.dim() <= MIOPEN_DIM_MAX\n           && !(groups > 1 && is_dilated()) // MIOpen currently does not support dilation with groups of size > 1\n           ;\n  }\n  bool use_mkldnn(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const  {\n#if AT_MKLDNN_ENABLED()\n    if (!at::globalContext().userEnabledMkldnn()) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    if (transposed && is_output_padding_big()) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    if (input.device().is_cpu() &&\n        ((input.scalar_type() == at::kBFloat16 && mkldnn_bf16_device_check()) ||\n         (input.scalar_type() == at::kHalf && mkldnn_fp16_device_check()))) {\n      return true;\n    }\n    return (input.is_mkldnn()) || // input is mkldnn Tensor\n      (input.device().is_cpu() &&\n       input.scalar_type() == kFloat && // only on CPU Float Tensors\n       // For 1x1 filters, MKLDNN is faster than THNN when multi-threaded,\n       // but THNN is faster when single-threaded.\n       (is_strided() || is_dilated() || at::symint::size<T>(input, 0) >= 16 ||\n        at::symint::size<T>(weight, -1) != 1 || at::symint::size<T>(weight, -2) != 1 || at::get_num_threads() > 1) &&\n       (groups > 1\n        || (at::symint::size<T>(weight, -1) > 3 && at::symint::size<T>(weight, -2) > 3)\n        || at::symint::size<T>(input, 0) > 1\n        || at::symint::size<T>(input, 0)*at::symint::size<T>(input, 1)*at::symint::size<T>(input, 2)*at::symint::size<T>(input, 3) > 20480) // for some case, native is faster\n        );\n\n#endif\n    return false;\n  }\n  bool use_nnpack(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const  {\n#if AT_NNPACK_ENABLED()\n    return at::globalContext().userEnabledNNPACK() &&\n           at::_nnpack_available() &&\n           input.device().is_cpu() &&\n           input.scalar_type() == kFloat && // only on CPU Float Tensors\n           !is_dilated() && // or dilation\n           !transposed &&   // or transposed tensors\n           input.ndimension() == 4 && // must be in NCHW format\n           weight.ndimension() == 4 &&\n           (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 2) < 17) && (at::symint::size<T>(weight, 3) < 17) && // NNPACK only supports kernels up to 16x16\n           (padding[0] < at::symint::size<T>(weight, 2)) && (padding[1] < at::symint::size<T>(weight, 3)) // NNPACK only supports padding < kernel_size. See https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/90142.\n#if !defined(C10_MOBILE)\n           && at::symint::size<T>(input, 0) >= 16 // ensure large enough batch size to ensure perf, tuneable\n#endif\n       ;\n#endif\n    return false;\n  }\n  bool use_xnnpack(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight,\n                   const at::OptionalArrayRef<T> bias_sizes_opt) const {\n#if defined(C10_MOBILE)\n    if (!transposed) {\n      // NB: for the call here, it MATTERS that we are templated. If you\n      // untemplate this to always use SymInt, the function\n      // xnnpack_use_convolution2d will always return false\n      return (at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == groups) &&\n              xnnpack_use_convolution2d(\n                  input,\n                  weight,\n                  bias_sizes_opt,\n                  padding,\n                  stride,\n                  dilation,\n                  groups,\n                  transposed);\n    }\n#endif\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  bool use_mps(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const {\n    // These checks need to be expanded. Currently we have very limited set of\n    // checks for MPS.\n#ifdef USE_MPS\n    if (needs_64bit_indexing_no_split(input, weight)) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    if (!input.is_mps()) {\n      return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n#else\n    return false;\n#endif\n  }\n\n  // We currently only have depthwise support for the case where groups ==\n  // nInputPlane and nInputPlane == nOutputPlane (the latter due to the lack of\n  // a depthwise multiplier)\n  bool is_depthwise(const at::Tensor& input, const at::Tensor& weight) const  {\n    return input.is_cuda() &&\n           !transposed &&\n           (input.ndimension() == 4 || input.ndimension() == 5) &&\n           at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == groups &&\n           groups > 1 && // no point if there is only a single group\n           at::symint::size<T>(weight, 0) % at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == 0; // output channels must be a multiple of input channels\n  }\n};\n\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(conv_depthwise2d_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(conv_depthwise3d_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(cudnn_convolution_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(cudnn_convolution_transpose_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(slow_conv_transpose3d_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(convolution_depthwise3x3_winograd_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(miopen_convolution_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(miopen_convolution_transpose_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(miopen_depthwise_convolution_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(mkldnn_convolution_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(mkldnn_convolution_transpose_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(mkldnn_convolution_transpose_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(slow_conv_dilated2d_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(slow_conv_dilated3d_backward_stub);\nDEFINE_DISPATCH(slow_conv_transpose2d_backward_stub);\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(conv_depthwise2d_backward_stub)\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(conv_depthwise3d_backward_stub)\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(cudnn_convolution_backward_stub)\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(cudnn_convolution_transpose_backward_stub)\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(miopen_convolution_backward_stub)\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(miopen_convolution_transpose_backward_stub)\nREGISTER_NO_CPU_DISPATCH(miopen_depthwise_convolution_backward_stub)\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nstatic std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream & out, const ConvParams<T>& params) {\n  out << \"ConvParams {\"\n      << \"  stride = \" << IntArrayRef{params.stride}\n      << \"  padding = \" << ArrayRef<T>{params.padding}\n      << \"  dilation = \" << IntArrayRef{params.dilation}\n      << \"  transposed = \" << params.transposed\n      << \"  output_padding = \" << ArrayRef<T>{params.output_padding}\n      << \"  groups = \" << params.groups\n      << \"  benchmark = \" << params.benchmark\n      << \"  deterministic = \" << params.deterministic\n      << \"  cudnn_enabled = \" << params.cudnn_enabled\n      << \"  allow_tf32 = \" << params.allow_tf32\n      << \"}\";\n  return out;\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nstatic void check_shape_forward(const at::Tensor& input,\n                                const c10::ArrayRef<T>& weight_sizes, const at::Tensor& bias,\n                                const ConvParams<T>& params) {\n  int64_t k = input.ndimension();\n  int64_t weight_dim = weight_sizes.size();\n  auto groups = params.groups;\n  const auto& padding = params.padding;\n  const auto& dilation = params.dilation;\n  bool transposed = params.transposed;\n\n  TORCH_CHECK(!params.is_padding_neg(), \"negative padding is not supported\");\n  TORCH_CHECK(!params.is_output_padding_neg(), \"negative output_padding is not supported\");\n  TORCH_CHECK(!params.is_stride_nonpos(), \"non-positive stride is not supported\");\n  TORCH_CHECK(!params.is_dilation_neg(), \"dilation should be greater than zero\");\n\n  TORCH_CHECK(weight_dim == k,\n           \"Expected \", weight_dim, \"-dimensional input for \", weight_dim,\n           \"-dimensional weight \", weight_sizes, \", but got \", k, \"-dimensional input of size \",\n           at::symint::sizes<T>(input), \" instead\");\n  TORCH_CHECK(weight_sizes[0] >= groups,\n           \"Given groups=\", groups, \", expected weight to be at least \", groups,\n           \" at dimension 0, but got weight of size \", weight_sizes, \" instead\");\n  TORCH_CHECK(weight_sizes[0] % groups == 0,\n           \"Given groups=\", groups, \", expected weight to be divisible by \",\n           groups, \" at dimension 0, but got weight of size [\", weight_sizes,\n           \"] instead\");\n\n  if (!transposed) {\n    std::vector<T> input_shape;\n    std::vector<T> kernel_shape;\n    bool kernel_size_correct = true;\n\n    TORCH_CHECK(at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == (weight_sizes[1] * groups),\n                \"Given groups=\", groups, \", weight of size \", weight_sizes,\n                \", expected input\", at::symint::sizes<T>(input), \" to have \",\n                (weight_sizes[1] * groups), \" channels, but got \", at::symint::size<T>(input, 1),\n                \" channels instead\");\n\n    TORCH_CHECK(!bias.defined() || (bias.ndimension() == 1 && at::symint::size<T>(bias, 0) == weight_sizes[0]),\n             \"Given weight of size \", weight_sizes,\n             \", expected bias to be 1-dimensional with \", weight_sizes[0], \" elements\",\n             \", but got bias of size \", at::symint::sizes<T>(bias), \" instead\");\n\n    for (const auto i : c10::irange(2, k)) {\n      input_shape.push_back(at::symint::size<T>(input, i) + 2 * padding[i-2]);\n      // log new kernel size considering dilation\n      kernel_shape.push_back(dilation[i-2] * (weight_sizes[i]-1) + 1);\n      if (input_shape.back() < kernel_shape.back()) {\n        kernel_size_correct = false;\n      }\n    }\n\n    TORCH_CHECK(input_shape.size() == kernel_shape.size(), \"Inconsistent shape between Input and Kernel\");\n\n    if (!kernel_size_correct) {\n      // If kernel size is incorrect\n      std::ostringstream input_ss;\n      std::ostringstream kernel_ss;\n      std::string separator = \"\";\n\n      for (int i = 0, len = input_shape.size(); i < len; ++i) {\n        input_ss << separator << input_shape[i];\n        kernel_ss << separator << kernel_shape[i];\n        separator = \" x \";\n      }\n\n      TORCH_CHECK(false, \"Calculated padded input size per channel: (\", input_ss.str(), \"). \"\n               \"Kernel size: (\", kernel_ss.str(), \"). Kernel size can't be greater than actual input size\");\n    }\n  } else { // transposed\n    TORCH_CHECK(at::symint::size<T>(input, 1) == weight_sizes[0],\n             \"Given transposed=\", transposed, \", weight of size \", weight_sizes,\n             \", expected input\", at::symint::sizes<T>(input), \" to have \", weight_sizes[0],\n             \" channels, but got \", at::symint::size<T>(input, 1), \" channels instead\");\n    TORCH_CHECK(!bias.defined() || (bias.ndimension() == 1 && at::symint::size<T>(bias, 0) == weight_sizes[1] * groups),\n             \"Given transposed=\", transposed, \", weight of size \", weight_sizes,\n             \", expected bias to be 1-dimensional with \", weight_sizes[1] * groups, \" elements\",\n             \", but got bias of size \", at::symint::sizes<T>(bias), \" instead\");\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nstatic void check_shape_backward(\n    const at::Tensor& input,\n    const c10::ArrayRef<T>& weight_sizes,\n    const ConvParams<T>& params) {\n  check_shape_forward<T>(input, weight_sizes, /*bias=*/ Tensor(), params);\n}\n\n// Given an input tensor and an expected number of spatial dimensions, checks that the\n// input is a valid shape and returns the batched form of the input.\n//\n// Args:\n//     input (Tensor): Input tensor\n//     num_spatial_dims (int): Number of spatial dimensions expected for
